version_description: The chord diagrams at the top are optional. You could just play it all over a Gm7 or you could also substitute the three chords as 3x00xx 3x33xx 3xx32x if you want to keep the G in the bass.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]

[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
xx33xx  xx77xx          |  xx00xx  xx33xx[/tab]
xx00xx  xx33xx  xx77xx  |  xx00xx  xx33xx

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                                              [ch]Dm7/C[/ch]          [ch]Cm7[/ch]            [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Love come quick - Love come in a hurry - There's thieves in the temple tonight[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                                                                        [ch]Dm7/C[/ch]          [ch]Cm7[/ch]            [ch]Gm7[/ch]
They don't care where they kick - Just as long as they hurt you - There're thieves in the temple tonight[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                                       [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Love, if you're there come save me - From all this cold despair[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                                      [ch]D7#5[/ch]
I can hang when you're around - But I’ll surely die if you're not there[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                                              [ch]Dm7/C[/ch]          [ch]Cm7[/ch]            [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Love come quick - Love come in a hurry - There's thieves in the temple tonight[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                                                                             [ch]Dm7/C[/ch]          [ch]Cm7[/ch]         [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Feel like I'm looking for my soul, like a poor man looking for gold - There're thieves in the temple tonight[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                                                 [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Voices from the sky say rely on your best friend to pull you through[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                                                                 [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Even if I wanted to I couldn't really truly cause my only friend is you – Come on[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm7/C[/ch]          [ch]Cm7[/ch]            [ch]Gm7[/ch]
There're thieves in the temple tonight[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
Kicking me in my heart - Tearing me, tearing me, tearing me, tearing me all apart[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm7/C[/ch]               [ch]Cm7[/ch]            [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Because me and you could've been a work of art (Thieves in the Temple)[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
Baby don't you know I'm holding on the best that I can - Love please help me be a better man[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Cm[/ch]                                [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Better than the thieves in the temple - in the temple tonight[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm7/C[/ch]          [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Oh, thieves in the temple    tonight (hurt me)[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                                              [ch]Dm7/C[/ch]          [ch]Cm7[/ch]            [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Love come quick - Love come in a hurry - There's thieves in the temple tonight[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
Thieves in the temple - You said you loved me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
Thieves in the temple – You were supposed to take care of me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
Love come quick - But they were lies! Lies[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Dm7/C[/ch]          [ch]Cm7[/ch]      [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Love come in a hurry - Thieves in the temple tonight[/tab]
